caption: The video appears to be a segment from the "HBCU Digest Podcast," as indicated by the title and logo displayed at the top of the screen. The podcast features three participants: Jarrett Carter Sr., who is shown on the left side of the screen wearing headphones and speaking into a microphone, and David & Jennifer Mercer, who are seated together on the right side. The setting for each participant varies; Jarrett is in a room with a couch and decorative pillows, while David and Jennifer are in a space with shelves displaying various items. The conversation seems to be focused on topics related to education or fitness, as suggested by the website URL "www.educationnewsflash.com" and the social media handle "@DIV9NEFITNESS." The participants appear engaged and are likely discussing relevant issues or sharing insights within their respective fields.
